findings.description: Duplicate CategoryService class — parallel implementation also exists at lib/application/accounting/category_service.dart with overlapping responsibilities
findings.rationale: MED-02 territory: two CategoryService implementations under different layers create naming ambiguity and risk of drift. Plus ResolveLedgerTypeService is deprecated alongside CategoryService (CONCERNS.md 'Deprecated services still wired').
findings.suggested_fix: Rename one of the two to reflect its actual concern (e.g., CategoryLocaleFormatter vs CategoryClassifier), or consolidate. Phase 6 fix.

findings.description: Duplicate CategoryService class — parallel implementation at lib/infrastructure/category/category_service.dart
findings.rationale: MED-02 paired finding with lib/infrastructure/category/category_service.dart. Both classes share the CategoryService name but live in different layers, blurring layer responsibility.
findings.suggested_fix: See companion finding on lib/infrastructure/category/category_service.dart. Phase 6 fix.
